label: Headline Quote · Landscape
description: Two-column landscape quote card. Headline and eyebrow on left, pull quote and attribution on right. White background with accent bar. For LinkedIn articles and Twitter banners.

slots.label: Bold headline
slots.example: The Rep Who Closes Walks in Informed

slots.label: Pull quote
slots.example: Before Momentify, our reps walked into customer visits with a brochure. Now they walk in with scan history, engagement scores, and talking points pre-loaded.

slots.label: Attribution
slots.example: — VP of Sales, Komatsu North America
